nodes.name: cli.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the deploy CLI that wires up all subcommands (deploy, doctor, rollback-plan, status, targets, validate) into a Commander program.

nodes.name: deploy.ts
nodes.summary: Registers the 'deploy' subcommand with all deployment options, parses concurrency flags, loads config, and delegates execution to the deploy-runner workflow.

nodes.name: registerDeployCommand
nodes.summary: Registers the deploy command with Commander, parsing all CLI options including concurrency, dry-run, smoke checks, and environment flags, then invoking the deploy runner.

nodes.name: doctor.ts
nodes.summary: Registers the 'doctor' command that validates CLI prerequisites (tool availability, Railway authentication) and reports diagnostic results.

nodes.name: registerDoctorCommand
nodes.summary: Registers the doctor subcommand that checks for required executables and Railway auth, reporting pass/fail status for each check.

nodes.name: rollback-plan.ts
nodes.summary: Registers the 'rollback-plan' command that reads a previous run artifact and outputs rollback guidance instructions.

nodes.name: status.ts
nodes.summary: Registers the 'status' command that queries Railway deployment statuses for specified targets and outputs results as text or JSON.

nodes.name: targets.ts
nodes.summary: Registers the 'targets' command that lists all configured deployment targets from the project config.

nodes.name: validate.ts
nodes.summary: Registers the 'validate' command that checks for Supabase function drift and resolves project refs, reporting any discrepancies.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: Loads and validates the deploy CLI configuration from disk using Zod schema, resolves the repository root, and validates cross-target consistency.

nodes.name: repoRootFrom
nodes.summary: Walks up the directory tree from a starting path to find the repository root by detecting package.json or deploy config files.

nodes.name: loadConfig
nodes.summary: Reads and Zod-validates the deploy config JSON file from the repository root, throwing on missing or invalid config.

nodes.name: resolveProjectRef
nodes.summary: Resolves the Supabase project reference from environment variable or a local ref file, with priority ordering.

nodes.name: errors.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the CLI error class hierarchy (CliError, ValidationError, DeployFailureError, AuthError, CancelledError, SmokeError) and helper functions for extracting exit codes and messages.

nodes.name: CliError
nodes.summary: Base error class for the deploy CLI that carries an exit code for process termination.

nodes.name: exec.ts
nodes.summary: Provides the ExecaProcessRunner class for executing shell commands with dry-run support, output redaction, and cancellation signal handling.

nodes.name: ExecaProcessRunner
nodes.summary: Process runner that wraps execa to execute shell commands with dry-run mode, abort signal support, streaming output, and automatic sensitive-value redaction.

nodes.name: logger.ts
nodes.summary: Creates a structured logger backed by Pino (JSON mode) or colorized console output, with automatic secret redaction for all log messages.

nodes.name: redaction.ts
nodes.summary: Provides string and object redaction utilities that mask Bearer tokens, key=value secrets, and Supabase service keys from log output and artifacts.

nodes.name: redact
nodes.summary: Replaces sensitive patterns (Bearer tokens, key=value assignments, Supabase secrets) in a string with redacted placeholders.

nodes.name: result.ts
nodes.summary: Factory functions for creating and finalizing deploy target result objects with status, timing, and metadata fields.

nodes.name: run-artifacts.ts
nodes.summary: Manages deploy run artifacts — generating run IDs and reading/writing redacted result JSON files to disk for rollback and audit purposes.

nodes.name: signals.ts
nodes.summary: Creates an AbortController wired to SIGINT and SIGTERM process signals for graceful deploy cancellation.

nodes.name: target-graph.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves, expands, normalizes, and deduplicates deploy targets from config, providing the target graph traversal logic for deploy orchestration.

nodes.name: allTargets
nodes.summary: Builds a flat list of all possible deploy targets (Supabase functions and Railway services) from the project config.

nodes.name: resolveTargets
nodes.summary: Resolves a list of requested target IDs against the known target graph, throwing on unknown targets and deduplicating the result.

nodes.name: expandTarget
nodes.summary: Expands a composite target (e.g. 'railway:all') into its constituent individual service targets using config ordering.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Central TypeScript type definitions for the deploy CLI including deploy config schema (Zod), target kinds, deploy options, run results, and process runner interfaces.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Zod for schema validation with z.infer for type extraction, providing both runtime validation and static typing.

nodes.name: railway.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the Railway deployment provider, wrapping the Railway CLI for service deployment, status polling, bootstrap of new services, and environment config application.

nodes.name: RailwayProvider
nodes.summary: Wraps Railway CLI commands to deploy services, poll status, validate service directories, and bootstrap newly created services with environment variables.

nodes.name: supabase.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the Supabase deployment provider, wrapping the Supabase CLI for function deployment, migration runs, project ref resolution, and function drift validation.

nodes.name: SupabaseProvider
nodes.summary: Wraps Supabase CLI commands for deploying functions, running migrations, resolving project refs, discovering local functions, and validating against remote state.

nodes.name: interactive.ts
nodes.summary: Provides an interactive checkbox prompt for selecting deploy targets when no specific targets are specified on the CLI.

nodes.name: output.ts
nodes.summary: Formats and prints deploy results, target lists, and smoke check summaries to the console in both human-readable and JSON formats.

nodes.name: progress.ts
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper around the 'ora' spinner library for displaying progress indicators during long-running deploy steps.

nodes.name: deploy-runner.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full deploy workflow — preflight checks, staged deployment of Supabase migrations, functions, and Railway services with concurrency control, rollback guidance collection, and optional smoke checks.

nodes.name: runDeploy
nodes.summary: Main deploy orchestrator that resolves targets, runs preflight checks, stages deployments across Supabase and Railway, collects results, and optionally runs post-deploy smoke checks.

nodes.name: deployStage
nodes.summary: Deploys a batch of targets concurrently up to a concurrency limit, tracking per-target spinners, results, and error handling.

nodes.name: deployTarget
nodes.summary: Dispatches a single deploy target to the appropriate provider (Supabase migrations, function, or Railway service).

nodes.name: rollback.ts
nodes.summary: Generates per-target rollback guidance instructions and aggregates them from a set of deploy results for display or artifact storage.

nodes.name: smoke-checks.ts
nodes.summary: Executes post-deploy smoke checks against Supabase edge functions, verifying function registry drift and performing HTTP health probes.

nodes.name: runSmokeChecks
nodes.summary: Runs post-deploy smoke checks comparing local vs remote function lists and making HTTP health probes to Supabase edge function endpoints.

nodes.name: config.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the deploy CLI config loading and validation logic.

nodes.name: deploy-runner.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the deploy runner workflow, verifying target resolution and deploy orchestration behavior.

nodes.name: errors.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for CLI error classes and error code/message extraction helpers.

nodes.name: railway.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the RailwayProvider, using a FakeRunner stub to verify CLI command construction and status parsing.

nodes.name: smoke-checks.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the smoke check workflow, verifying function drift detection and HTTP probe behavior.

nodes.name: supabase.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the SupabaseProvider using a FakeRunner stub to verify CLI command arguments and function deployment logic.

nodes.name: target-graph.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for target graph resolution, expansion, normalization, and deduplication logic.

nodes.name: auth.ts
nodes.summary: Shared authentication utilities for Supabase edge functions, providing JWT bearer extraction, service-role token validation, and admin/user access control guards.

nodes.name: requireAdminOrService
nodes.summary: Guards an edge function request by verifying the caller is either a service-role client or an authenticated admin user, querying user_profiles and user_access tables to enforce access.

nodes.name: requireServiceRole
nodes.summary: Validates that a request carries a valid service-role bearer token, returning the extracted token or throwing on failure.

nodes.name: auth_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the shared auth module, providing mock request, service client, and user client factories to cover token validation and access control scenarios.

nodes.name: cors.ts
nodes.summary: CORS helper for Supabase edge functions that resolves allowed origins from environment configuration and builds appropriate response headers.

nodes.name: resolveAllowedOrigin
nodes.summary: Checks an incoming origin against a configurable allowlist derived from the ALLOWED_ORIGINS environment variable.

nodes.name: buildCorsHeaders
nodes.summary: Constructs a Headers object with Access-Control-Allow-Origin, Methods, and Headers values for CORS preflight and response handling.

nodes.name: cron-run-log.ts
nodes.summary: Shared utilities for cron job run logging, extracting run context from request headers and persisting structured log events via a Supabase RPC call.

nodes.name: logCronRunEvent
nodes.summary: Logs a structured cron run event to the database via RPC, also emitting the event to the edge logger for observability.

nodes.name: function-invoke.ts
nodes.summary: Utility for invoking other Supabase edge functions via HTTP with service-role authentication, timeout support, and error reporting.

nodes.name: invokeFunction
nodes.summary: Calls a named Supabase edge function with a JSON body, service-role key header, and configurable timeout, returning the response text on success.

nodes.name: function-invoke_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the invokeFunction utility, covering success and error paths with mocked fetch implementations.

nodes.name: html.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal HTML escaping utility that replaces special characters with their HTML entity equivalents to prevent XSS in email/HTML output.

nodes.name: html_test.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal test suite for the HTML escaping utility.

nodes.name: logger.ts
nodes.summary: Structured logging utilities for edge functions including error serialization, PostgREST error detection, and JSON-formatted log event emission at multiple severity levels.

nodes.name: logEdgeEvent
nodes.summary: Emits a structured JSON log line to stdout/stderr with timestamp, level, message, and context fields.

nodes.name: serializeError
nodes.summary: Converts an arbitrary error value into a structured serializable object, handling PostgREST errors, standard Error instances, and plain objects.

nodes.name: sentry.ts
nodes.summary: Sentry error reporting integration for Supabase edge functions, initializing the SDK on demand and capturing exceptions with contextual tags.

nodes.name: captureEdgeException
nodes.summary: Initializes Sentry if not already done, sets contextual scope tags from environment and caller-provided context, then captures and flushes the exception.

nodes.name: service-role-handler.ts
nodes.summary: Framework for building service-role-protected Supabase edge functions, providing a Deno.serve wrapper that authenticates requests, creates the Supabase service client, and handles errors with Sentry reporting.

nodes.name: ServiceRoleJsonError
nodes.summary: Custom error class for structured service-role handler errors carrying an HTTP status code and message.

nodes.name: serveServiceRoleJson
nodes.summary: Bootstraps a Deno HTTP server that validates the service-role bearer token, creates a Supabase client, calls the user handler, and returns JSON responses with proper error handling and Sentry capture.

nodes.name: stock-images.ts
nodes.summary: Multi-provider stock image search library supporting Pexels, Pixabay, and Unsplash, with event-title-based search term derivation and Unsplash download tracking.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a priority-ordered provider queue; falls back across providers until an image is found.

nodes.name: findFallbackImage
nodes.summary: Orchestrates a multi-provider, multi-query fallback image search by trying derived title terms and event tags across configured Pexels, Pixabay, and Unsplash providers.

nodes.name: searchUnsplash
nodes.summary: Queries the Unsplash API for photos matching a search term and returns a normalized image result with attribution metadata.

nodes.name: deriveTitleSearchTerm
nodes.summary: Derives a clean stock-image search query from a raw event title by stripping venue suffixes, punctuation, and noise words.

nodes.name: stock-images_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the stock-images module, primarily covering the deriveTitleSearchTerm function with a variety of event title inputs.

nodes.name: unsplash.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for the Unsplash integration module covering search, attribution extraction, photo lookup by URL, and download tracking with mocked fetch.

nodes.name: unsplash.ts
nodes.summary: Dedicated Unsplash API client providing photo search, CDN URL parsing, attribution extraction, photo lookup by URL, and download tracking for compliance with Unsplash API guidelines.

nodes.name: findFallbackImage
nodes.summary: Searches Unsplash for a fallback event image using derived title terms and tag-based queries, returning a normalized result with attribution.

nodes.name: lookupUnsplashPhotoFromUrl
nodes.summary: Resolves a full Unsplash photo record from an existing CDN image URL by extracting the photo ID and calling the Unsplash photos API.

nodes.name: trackUnsplashDownload
nodes.summary: Triggers the Unsplash download tracking endpoint for a photo to comply with the Unsplash API attribution requirements.

nodes.name: validation.ts
nodes.summary: Input validation utilities for edge function request parsing, providing typed readers for strings, emails, and UUIDs with error throwing on invalid input.

nodes.name: validation_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the shared validation utilities covering string, email, and UUID reading and error cases.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that iterates events lacking vector embeddings and generates them in batches using the embed-event handler, respecting a configurable time budget.

nodes.name: backfillEmbeddings
nodes.summary: Processes a batch of events without embeddings, calling embedEvent for each and tracking success/failure counts while respecting a wall-clock time limit.

nodes.name: index_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the backfill-embeddings function using in-memory fake Supabase query builder and mocked fetch to validate batching, retry, and time-budget behavior.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Large edge function that enriches pending events with geocoded coordinates, stock images, Unsplash attribution, and parent tips, running multiple enrichment passes over database rows.

nodes.summary: Performs all enrichment steps for a single event row including geocoding, image search, Unsplash download tracking, and database updates via RPC calls.

nodes.name: runUnsplashAttributionBackfillPass
nodes.summary: Iterates events with Unsplash images lacking attribution records, resolves attribution via photo URL lookup, and upserts attribution rows.

nodes.name: parent-tips-pass.ts
nodes.summary: Enrichment pass that generates AI parent tips for events by invoking the generate-parent-tips edge function and recording pass results via cron run logging.

nodes.name: runParentTipsPass
nodes.summary: Checks if the parent-tips AI feature is enabled, fetches a batch of events needing tips, invokes the generator function for each, and logs success/failure via cron run events.

nodes.name: parent-tips-pass_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the parent-tips enrichment pass using a FakeSupabase stub and mocked fetch to verify feature-flag checking, batch processing, and error handling.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Edge function entry point that uses the service-role handler to delete stale cron run log entries from the database.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that performs scheduled database maintenance tasks, logging cron run context via the shared cron-run-log helper.

nodes.name: handler.ts
nodes.summary: Core handler for the embed-event edge function: generates vector embeddings for event text using an external API and stores them in the event_embeddings table, with full error handling and Sentry reporting.
nodes.languageNotes: Deno edge function using dependency injection pattern (deps object) for testability.

nodes.name: generateEmbedding
nodes.summary: Calls an external embedding API to generate a vector embedding for the given text, with timeout and error handling.

nodes.name: storeEmbedding
nodes.summary: Upserts a computed event embedding vector into the event_embeddings table via Supabase client.

nodes.summary: Validates and dispatches an embed-event request body, fetching event data from the database and invoking embedEvent for each event ID.

nodes.name: handleRequest
nodes.summary: HTTP entry point for the embed-event function: authenticates the request, parses the body, and dispatches to handleEmbedEventRequest with error handling and Sentry capture.

nodes.name: handler_test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for embed-event handler functions, using fake Supabase and fetch implementations to verify embedding generation, storage, and error paths.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the embed-event Supabase edge function; delegates all handling to handler.ts.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that records cron run events to the database using the shared service-role handler.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that sends transactional notification emails (admin requests, approvals, rejections, community event status) via the Resend API with inline HTML email templates.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains full inline HTML email templates with styled components rather than a separate template engine.

nodes.name: parsePayload
nodes.summary: Parses and validates incoming notification email request payloads, dispatching on notification type and enforcing required fields.

nodes.name: wrapEmailShell
nodes.summary: Renders the shared HTML email wrapper (header, body slot, footer) used by all notification email templates.

nodes.name: sendViaResend
nodes.summary: Sends an HTML email via the Resend API with timeout and error handling.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function entry point that processes the event review queue batch by delegating to the worker library with cron run logging.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that dequeues and dispatches pending user notifications, formatting event date strings and change summaries for inclusion in messages.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes inline date formatting and change-summary helpers rather than importing them from shared utilities.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that claims and processes a batch of source-queue rows, coordinating reaping of stuck rows and invoking per-row workers.

nodes.name: processSourceQueueBatch

nodes.name: index.ts

nodes.summary: Claims tag-queue rows and processes them in parallel chunks, managing timeout budgets, early stopping, and per-row tagging via callTagEvent.

nodes.summary: Updates a tag-queue row to dead or pending-with-backoff depending on retry count, computing exponential backoff delay.

nodes.name: index_test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration-style tests for processTagQueueBatch using fake Supabase and fetch implementations to verify queue claiming, per-row tagging, retry, and dead-letter logic.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that finds due scrape sources and enqueues them for processing, with payload normalization and cron run logging.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that scrapes a single event source, with CORS handling, authentication, source queue integration, and Sentry error capture.

nodes.name: source-queue.ts
nodes.summary: Utility library for interacting with the source-scrape queue: enqueuing scrapes, building response objects, and kicking the process-source-queue function.

nodes.name: enqueueSourceScrape
nodes.summary: Calls the enqueue_source_scrape Supabase RPC to add a source to the scrape queue with a given trigger type.

nodes.name: kickProcessSourceQueue
nodes.summary: Invokes the process-source-queue edge function to immediately trigger queue processing after a scrape is enqueued.

nodes.name: source-queue_test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for source-queue utilities, using a fake Supabase client to verify enqueueSourceScrape behavior.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that sends authentication emails (verify email, magic link, password reset) via the Resend API with branded HTML templates.

nodes.name: buildActionEmailHtml
nodes.summary: Renders a complete action-oriented auth email HTML document with branded header, greeting, CTA button, and footer.

nodes.name: sendEmail
nodes.summary: Posts an email send request to the Resend API with timeout and structured error handling.

nodes.name: index.ts

nodes.name: buildVapidAuth
nodes.summary: Builds the VAPID Authorization header for web push by creating a signed JWT using the ECDSA private key.

nodes.name: encryptPayload
nodes.summary: Encrypts a push notification payload using the RFC 8291 Web Push encryption scheme (ECDH + HKDF + AES-128-GCM).

nodes.name: mobile-push.ts
nodes.summary: Library for sending mobile push notifications via Apple APNs (JWT-authenticated) and Firebase FCM (service account OAuth), including credential validation and payload builders.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements APNs JWT signing and FCM OAuth2 token acquisition using the WebCrypto API directly (no third-party library).

nodes.name: signApnsJwt
nodes.summary: Creates a signed JWT for Apple Push Notification Service authentication using ECDSA P-256.

nodes.name: getFcmAccessToken
nodes.summary: Obtains a Firebase Cloud Messaging OAuth2 access token by creating and signing a service-account JWT, then exchanging it with the Google token endpoint.

nodes.name: partitionMobileSubscriptions
nodes.summary: Splits a list of mobile push subscription rows into separate APNs and FCM buckets by platform type.

nodes.name: mobile-push_test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for mobile-push library functions, verifying partitioning, credential status, and request building helpers.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that sends scheduled event reminder notifications to subscribed users, with date formatting and row flattening helpers.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that sends weekly digest emails to opted-in users, rendering a branded HTML email with event cards and dispatching via Resend.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains a full inline HTML email digest template with responsive layout and event card components.

nodes.name: renderDigestHtml
nodes.summary: Renders the full weekly digest HTML email document for a user, embedding event cards, greeting, CTA, and footer.

nodes.name: renderEventCardHtml
nodes.summary: Renders an individual event card HTML snippet for inclusion in the weekly digest email.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Supabase edge function that proxies weather data requests to the Open-Meteo API with CORS handling, coordinate validation, and Sentry error reporting.

nodes.name: guarded-fetch.ts

nodes.name: SsrfRejectedError
nodes.summary: Custom error class thrown when a fetch attempt is rejected due to SSRF protection — the resolved IP is private or blocked.

nodes.name: guardedFetch

nodes.name: parsing.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the shared parsing utility module, covering date parsing, HTML decoding, text normalization, shortcode stripping, price extraction, and dedup key generation.

nodes.name: parsing.ts
nodes.summary: Shared text and date parsing utilities for event ingestion — includes ISO/iCal date parsing, HTML entity decoding, text normalization, shortcode stripping, price extraction, and dedup key generation.

nodes.name: parseIcalDate
nodes.summary: Parses iCal date/datetime strings (YYYYMMDD, YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ, and local variants) into ISO 8601 UTC strings.

nodes.name: decodeHtml
nodes.summary: Decodes HTML entities (named, decimal, and hex code points) in a string, handling edge cases for valid Unicode code points.

nodes.name: stripShortcodes
nodes.summary: Removes WordPress/Divi shortcode tags (including truncated trailing ones) from text while preserving normal prose in brackets.

nodes.name: extractPrice
nodes.summary: Extracts a numeric admission price from event description text using free/paid keyword patterns and dollar-amount regex.

nodes.name: dedupKey
nodes.summary: Generates a deduplication key for an event from its title, start datetime, and city ID to prevent duplicate ingestion.

nodes.name: url-resolve.ts
nodes.summary: Provides DNS resolution and IP blocking logic to prevent SSRF attacks — resolves hostnames via Deno DNS and checks resolved IPs against IPv4/IPv6 private range blocklists.

nodes.name: resolveAndCheckPublicIp
nodes.summary: Validates and resolves a URL to its public IP(s) via DNS, blocking any resolution to private/loopback/link-local addresses to prevent SSRF.

nodes.name: url-validation.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the URL validation module, covering external URL validation including IPv4 and IPv6 private address blocking and allowed public address scenarios.

nodes.name: url-validation.ts
nodes.summary: URL validation library that parses and blocks requests to private/internal IPv4 and IPv6 addresses before DNS resolution, providing an early SSRF guard layer.

nodes.name: validateExternalUrl
nodes.summary: Validates that a URL points to an external (non-private, non-loopback) host by parsing and checking IPv4/IPv6 literals in the URL without DNS resolution.

nodes.name: llm-extraction.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates LLM-based event extraction from scrape artifacts, resolving the LLM configuration and calling the OpenAI chat completion API with a structured prompt, then parsing the returned JSON events.

nodes.name: extractWithLlm
nodes.summary: Sends a scrape artifact to the LLM with a structured extraction prompt and returns parsed event objects from the completion response.

nodes.name: worker.ts
nodes.summary: Core worker logic for the process-source-queue edge function — handles queue row lifecycle (claim, start, retry, skip), orchestrates deterministic and LLM extraction phases, and persists results back to Supabase.
nodes.languageNotes: Dependency-injection pattern via a dependencies parameter enables testability of all Supabase and LLM calls.

nodes.name: processSourceQueueRow
nodes.summary: Top-level worker entry point for processing a single source queue row — loads source, runs extraction, imports events, and marks the row succeeded or retries on error.

nodes.name: extractParsedEventsForSource

nodes.name: runDeterministicExtractionPhase

nodes.name: handleExtractionFailure
nodes.summary: Handles extraction errors by persisting an error trace, marking the run as errored, and scheduling a retry with exponential backoff.

nodes.name: worker_test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration-style test suite for the process-source-queue worker, using fake Supabase clients and injected dependencies to verify queue row lifecycle, extraction orchestration, and retry/skip logic.

nodes.name: date_test.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal test file for the date utility module using inline assert helpers to verify wallClockToIso and related date conversion functions.

nodes.name: event-processing_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the resolveProcessingMode function, verifying correct processing mode selection based on source configuration.

nodes.name: extraction-pipeline_test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the extraction pipeline module, covering LLM JSON response parsing and event validation logic.

nodes.name: parser-context.ts
nodes.summary: Exports the ParserContext type used to pass shared state (timezone, fetch helpers) into parser implementations across the scrape-source function.

nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: Main CI workflow triggered on pull_request and push to main, running four parallel jobs: secret scanning with TruffleHog and Gitleaks, TypeScript type checking, workspace guard tests, and a DB type-drift guard that spins up a local Supabase instance to detect stale generated types.

nodes.name: secret-scan
nodes.summary: Scans every commit for leaked credentials using TruffleHog (verified secrets only) and Gitleaks on full git history.

nodes.name: check
nodes.summary: Installs pnpm dependencies and runs the monorepo-wide TypeScript type-check via `pnpm run check`.

nodes.name: workspace-guards
nodes.summary: Runs workspace guard tests (`pnpm run workspace:test`) to enforce cross-package invariants.

nodes.name: type-drift
nodes.summary: Starts a local Supabase instance, regenerates TypeScript database types, and fails if the committed `database.types.ts` is stale compared to the live schema.

nodes.name: publish-packages.yml
nodes.summary: Publishes the `packages/contracts` package to GitHub Packages (npm registry) when changes are pushed to main under `packages/contracts/src/**` or `.changeset/**`; skips publication idempotently if the version is already published.

nodes.name: publish
nodes.summary: Checks if the current package version is already published to GitHub Packages; if not, runs `pnpm publish` for the contracts package.

nodes.name: railway-cron-drift.yml
nodes.summary: Guards against Railway cron schedule drift on pull requests by running Terraform plan against the `infra/railway-cron-drift` config and failing if the live Railway environment diverges from the declared state.

nodes.name: drift-guard
nodes.summary: Prints Railway cron diagnostics, validates Railway API token, runs `terraform init` and `validate`, then executes `terraform plan` with `--detailed-exitcode` to detect any drift.

nodes.name: railway-sandbox-verify.yml
nodes.summary: Conditionally runs an arbitrary command inside a Railway sandbox environment for PRs labeled `railway-sandbox` or touching Railway-related files, plus supports manual dispatch with configurable command and private-network options.

nodes.name: evaluate_trigger
nodes.summary: Evaluates whether the sandbox verification job should run by checking for the `railway-sandbox` PR label or detecting changes to Railway-related paths.

nodes.name: sandbox-verify
nodes.summary: Installs dependencies and runs the Railway sandbox repo-check script with the configured command, ref, and optional private-network flag.

nodes.name: 20260601000000_schema_baseline.sql
nodes.summary: Consolidated schema baseline consolidating all prior migrations; defines 23 core tables (events, cities, tags, event_sources, user_profiles, invite system, source/tag queues, audit logs, etc.) and 40+ private/public RPC functions including bulk_import_scrape_events, admin CRUD helpers, and search RPCs.
nodes.languageNotes: Multi-source squash migration combining ~30 earlier migration files; serves as the authoritative schema baseline for production resets.

nodes.name: events
nodes.summary: Core events table storing family event records with title, datetime, location, AI tagging status, admin lock fields, and source provenance.

nodes.name: source_scrape_queue
nodes.summary: Queue table tracking source scraping jobs with status, attempt counts, and retry timing.

nodes.name: event_tag_queue
nodes.summary: Queue table tracking AI tagging jobs for individual events with status and retry tracking.

nodes.name: cities
nodes.summary: Reference table for supported cities with geographic coordinates, slug, and timezone.

nodes.name: event_sources
nodes.summary: Catalog of event data sources with scrape configuration, auto-approval flags, and processing mode settings.

nodes.name: tags
nodes.summary: Taxonomy of event tags with slug, color, category, and system flag.

nodes.name: user_profiles
nodes.summary: Extended user profile data linked to auth.users with display name and access level.

nodes.name: invite_codes
nodes.summary: Invite code records controlling user registration gating with usage limits and expiry.

nodes.name: admin_audit_log
nodes.summary: Audit trail for admin operations recording action type, target, before/after state, and performing admin.

nodes.name: source_runs
nodes.summary: Records of each source scrape run with timing, counters, and final status.

nodes.name: railway_cron_runs
nodes.summary: Private schema table recording Railway cron job execution history with timing and status.

nodes.name: bulk_import_scrape_events
nodes.summary: SECURITY DEFINER RPC that batch-imports scraped events via a single CTE chain, classifying each as insert/update, applying admin_locked_fields, and bulk-enqueuing tag jobs. Returns imported/updated/skipped/enqueued counts.

nodes.name: admin_update_event
nodes.summary: Admin RPC for updating event fields with validation, locked-field enforcement, and audit logging.

nodes.name: is_enabled_user
nodes.summary: Helper function checking if the current authenticated user has enabled access, used in RLS policies.

nodes.name: 20260601000001_admin_dashboard_presence_track_policy.sql
nodes.summary: Adds an RLS policy on realtime.messages allowing admin users to track presence on the dashboard:events channel.

nodes.name: 20260601001000_reference_security_and_cron.sql
nodes.summary: Seeds reference data (cities, tags, event sources) and configures security settings and cron job schedules for the production database.

nodes.name: 20260601002000_event_ingestion_admin_foundation.sql
nodes.summary: Establishes core event ingestion RPCs: bulk_import_scrape_events, events_enriched_v2, search_events_v2, admin_events_enriched, and enrichment pipeline helpers (list/update event enrichment, db health snapshot).

nodes.name: events_enriched_v2
nodes.summary: Public RPC returning enriched event rows with joined tags, city, and image data for the client feed, supporting cursor pagination.

nodes.name: search_events_v2
nodes.summary: Public RPC for full-text and faceted event search with age, price, tag, and keyword filters.

nodes.name: 20260601003000_maintenance_and_admin_queues.sql
nodes.summary: Adds maintenance RPCs (run_daily_maintenance, refresh_timezone_names), queue management functions (delete dead queue entries), and admin event management RPCs (set status, batch delete, create source, set user access).

nodes.name: 20260601004000_llm_review_and_enrichment.sql
nodes.summary: Creates event_llm_review_queue and event_llm_review_traces tables and their associated RPCs for claiming, starting, releasing, and reaping LLM review queue rows; adds bulk processing mode and auto-approve admin helpers.

nodes.name: event_llm_review_queue
nodes.summary: Queue table for AI/LLM review jobs on events, tracking status, provider, model, and retry state.

nodes.name: event_llm_review_traces
nodes.summary: Trace records for LLM event review executions storing model decision, confidence, flags, and raw response payload.

nodes.name: 20260601005000_ai_models_and_cron_drilldown.sql
nodes.summary: Creates approved_ai_models and ai_feature_config tables for AI model governance, adds cron_run_log_entries table with log_cron_run_event/log_railway_cron_run helpers, and railway_cron_run_detail drilldown RPC.

nodes.name: approved_ai_models
nodes.summary: Registry of approved AI models with provider, model ID, and feature flags controlling which models may be used for event review.

nodes.name: ai_feature_config
nodes.summary: Per-feature AI configuration settings stored as key-value pairs controlling model selection and pipeline behavior.

nodes.name: cron_run_log_entries
nodes.summary: Private table storing structured log entries for individual cron job run events with severity and metadata.

nodes.name: 20260601006000_enrichment_images_and_rpc_cleanup.sql
nodes.summary: Overhauls enrichment pipeline RPCs (list_events_needing_enrichment, parent_tips validation), creates event_image_attributions table with Unsplash/Pexels/Pixabay attribution tracking, and adds image upsert and download tracking RPCs.

nodes.name: event_image_attributions
nodes.summary: Stores image attribution records for events with provider (unsplash/pexels/pixabay), photographer credit, URLs, and download tracking status.

nodes.name: 20260601007000_lafayette_new_sources.sql
nodes.summary: Seeds three new Lafayette-area iCal event sources (Lafayette Mom, Hilliard Art Museum, Vermilionville) and fixes the Acadiana Center for the Arts URL.

nodes.name: 20260601008000_tier3_lafayette_sources.sql
nodes.summary: Adds tier-3 Lafayette event sources columns (date_window_days, is_active defaults) and seeds additional Lafayette-area sources with ALTER TABLE statements.

nodes.name: 20260601009000_cron_review_events_allowlist.sql
nodes.summary: Replaces list_railway_cron_jobs RPC with an allowlist-filtered version that only returns cron jobs matching approved job name patterns.

nodes.name: 20260601010000_admin_events_realtime.sql
nodes.summary: Adds broadcast_admin_event_changes trigger function for Supabase Realtime and a policy allowing admin users to receive dashboard realtime messages.

nodes.name: 20260601011000_add_pexels_pixabay_providers.sql
nodes.summary: Extends event_image_attributions to support Pexels and Pixabay providers by adding provider-specific nullable columns and adjusting constraints.

nodes.name: 20260601011001_fix_provider_constraint.sql
nodes.summary: Fixes the image attribution provider constraint to correctly allow unsplash, pexels, and pixabay values by dropping and recreating the CHECK constraint.

nodes.name: 20260601012000_disable_invite_gate.sql
nodes.summary: Replaces the invites_required() function to return false, effectively disabling the invite gate for open registration.

nodes.name: 20260601013000_reset_invite_gate_guc.sql
nodes.summary: Resets the invite gate GUC (app.invites_required) configuration parameter to ensure consistent behavior across sessions.

nodes.name: 20260601014000_fix_invite_gate_default.sql
nodes.summary: Updates invites_required() function default behavior to respect a GUC setting with a safe fallback, fixing the invite gate configuration.

nodes.name: 20260601015000_fix_invite_gate_single_source.sql
nodes.summary: Rewrites handle_new_user and enforce_invited_oauth_signup trigger functions so the invite gate check draws from a single authoritative invites_required() source.

nodes.name: 20260601016000_anon_access_for_public_browsing.sql
nodes.summary: Grants execute permissions on public event-browsing RPCs (events_enriched, search_events, find_similar_events) to the anon role for unauthenticated access.

nodes.name: 20260601017000_event_status_enum_and_validate_checks.sql
nodes.summary: Introduces event status and LLM review enums, updates admin_set_event_status/admin_batch_set_event_status for enum safety, rewrites apply_event_llm_review_decision with full trace recording, and overhauls events_enriched and search_events public RPCs.

nodes.name: events_enriched
nodes.summary: Public cursor-paginated RPC returning enriched event rows with optional city, status, user, date range, and event ID filters for client consumption.

nodes.name: search_events
nodes.summary: Public RPC for multi-faceted event search with city, date, age, price, tag, keyword, and status filters plus cursor pagination.

nodes.name: apply_event_llm_review_decision
nodes.summary: Records a completed LLM review decision, persisting trace data and updating event status based on the applied decision.

nodes.name: 20260601018000_fix_events_enriched_enum_cast.sql
nodes.summary: Drops and recreates events_enriched RPC to fix an enum cast issue that caused runtime errors when filtering by event status.

nodes.name: 20260601019000_restore_events_enriched_cursor_signature.sql
nodes.summary: Drops and recreates events_enriched RPC to restore the correct cursor-based pagination signature with after_start_datetime and after_id parameters.

nodes.name: 20260601020000_event_embeddings_and_similarity.sql
nodes.summary: Creates event_embeddings table for pgvector storage and adds find_similar_events RPC for cosine-similarity-based event recommendations.

nodes.name: event_embeddings
nodes.summary: Stores pgvector embeddings for events indexed with HNSW for efficient cosine-similarity searches.

nodes.name: find_similar_events
nodes.summary: RPC returning the top-N most similar events to a given query embedding using cosine distance on the event_embeddings table.

nodes.name: 20260601021000_admin_event_decisions.sql
nodes.summary: Creates admin_event_decisions table for persisting admin manual decisions on events and updates admin_update_event RPC to log decisions and respect locked fields.

nodes.name: admin_event_decisions
nodes.summary: Records admin manual decisions on events with action type, notes, and admin user reference.

nodes.name: 20260601022000_source_auto_reject_and_stats.sql
nodes.summary: Adds should_auto_reject_source and pipeline_learning_stats RPCs to enable data-driven decisions on source auto-rejection thresholds.

nodes.name: pipeline_learning_stats
nodes.summary: Returns aggregate LLM review decision statistics per source to inform auto-rejection threshold configuration.

nodes.name: 20260601023000_fix_ai_settings_rpc_grants.sql
nodes.summary: Fixes GRANT/REVOKE statements on AI settings RPCs to ensure correct role access for upsert_ai_feature_config and get_approved_ai_models.

nodes.name: 20260601024000_admin_retry_dead_tag_queue.sql
nodes.summary: Adds admin_retry_dead_tag_queue RPC and updates admin_retry_source_scrape_queue and admin_retry_tag_queue to include dead-queue item retry capability.

nodes.name: 20260601025000_baton_rouge_sources.sql
nodes.summary: Seeds additional Baton Rouge event sources with ALTER TABLE and INSERT statements for new city-specific scrapers.

nodes.name: 20260601026000_fix_unindexed_fk_admin_event_decisions.sql
nodes.summary: Adds missing indexes on admin_event_decisions foreign key columns (event_id, admin_id) to fix unindexed foreign key performance warnings.

nodes.name: 20260601027000_user_notification_preferences.sql
nodes.summary: Creates user_notification_preferences table and upsert_notification_preferences RPC for managing per-user push and email notification settings.

nodes.name: user_notification_preferences
nodes.summary: Stores per-user notification preference settings including push_enabled, email_enabled, and event change notification flags.

nodes.name: 20260601028000_search_events_radius_filter.sql
nodes.summary: Replaces search_events RPC with a version that adds optional lat/lon/radius_km geospatial filtering using PostGIS earth_distance functions.

nodes.name: search_events
nodes.summary: Updated search_events RPC adding lat/lon/radius_km parameters for proximity-based event filtering in addition to existing facet filters.

nodes.name: 20260601029000_find_similar_events_by_id.sql
nodes.summary: Adds find_similar_events_by_id RPC that looks up an event's own embedding and delegates to find_similar_events for ID-based similarity queries.

nodes.name: find_similar_events_by_id
nodes.summary: RPC returning events similar to a given event ID by fetching the event's stored embedding and performing cosine similarity search.

nodes.name: 20260601030000_push_and_notifications.sql
nodes.summary: Creates push_subscriptions and user_notifications tables with RPCs for registering/unregistering push endpoints, marking notifications read, and capping notification counts per user.

nodes.name: push_subscriptions
nodes.summary: Stores Web Push API subscription endpoints and keys per user device for push notification delivery.

nodes.name: user_notifications
nodes.summary: In-app notification records per user with type, payload, and read status for the notification inbox.

nodes.name: 20260601031000_event_change_notifications.sql
nodes.summary: Creates notification_queue table and notify_event_changes trigger function that enqueues notifications for users who have saved events when those events are updated.

nodes.name: notification_queue
nodes.summary: Queue table for outbound notifications to be delivered to users, with service-role RLS and delivery status tracking.

nodes.name: 20260601032000_drop_old_search_events_overload.sql
nodes.summary: Drops old overloaded signatures of search_events and admin_update_event that were superseded by newer RPC versions.

nodes.name: 20260601033000_community_event_submission.sql
nodes.summary: Adds submit_community_event RPC allowing authenticated users to submit events for admin review, with deduplication and source-specific handling.

nodes.name: submit_community_event
nodes.summary: Public RPC for authenticated users to submit new community events; creates a draft event and enqueues it for admin review.

nodes.name: 20260601034000_activate_baton_rouge_sources.sql
nodes.summary: Activates the Baton Rouge event sources (BREC Parks, BREC Kids, City-Parish Calendar, LocalHop) by setting is_active=true.

nodes.name: 20260601035000_community_event_status_notification.sql
nodes.summary: Adds notify_community_event_status trigger function that enqueues notifications to event submitters when their community-submitted event status changes.

nodes.name: 20260601036000_admin_user_delete.sql
nodes.summary: Adds admin_delete_user RPC enabling admins to fully purge a user account including auth.users, cascading to profiles and associated data.

nodes.name: admin_delete_user
nodes.summary: SECURITY DEFINER RPC allowing admins to delete a user by ID from auth.users with cascading cleanup of profile and associated records.

nodes.name: 20260610162002_enqueue_source_scrape_rpc.sql
nodes.summary: Adds enqueue_source_scrape RPC enabling admins to manually trigger a scrape job for a specific source by inserting into the source_scrape_queue.

nodes.name: enqueue_source_scrape
nodes.summary: Admin RPC that enqueues a manual scrape job for a given source ID in the source_scrape_queue table.

nodes.name: 20260610170000_admin_events_source_filter.sql
nodes.summary: Replaces admin_events_enriched and admin_event_facets RPCs with versions that add source-based filtering (p_source_id parameter) for the admin event dashboard.

nodes.name: admin_events_enriched
nodes.summary: Admin-facing paginated RPC returning enriched event rows with rich filter support including status, city, source, keyword, LLM review status, and cursor pagination.

nodes.name: admin_event_facets
nodes.summary: Admin RPC returning aggregate facet counts (status, city, source, LLM review) for the admin event list filter UI.

nodes.name: 20260610180000_admin_dashboard_stats.sql
nodes.summary: Adds admin_dashboard_stats RPC returning a single-row snapshot of key operational metrics (event counts by status, queue depths, source counts) for the admin dashboard.

nodes.name: admin_dashboard_stats
nodes.summary: Returns aggregate dashboard metrics including published/draft/rejected event counts, queue depths, and active source count.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template listing all required environment variables for the monorepo: Supabase connection (URL, anon key, service role key), Resend email API key, Railway deployment token, and GitHub Packages PAT for consuming scoped npm packages.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers three external service integrations: Supabase (database/auth), Resend (email), and Railway (infra/cron).

nodes.name: .gitleaks.toml

nodes.languageNotes: Uses TOML [extend] and [allowlist] tables; integrates with the gitleaks step in .github/workflows/ci.yml.

nodes.name: package.json

nodes.languageNotes: Private monorepo root; uses pnpm filter flags to delegate per-package commands such as deploy-cli and contracts checks.

nodes.name: pnpm-workspace.yaml
nodes.summary: pnpm workspace definition declaring the packages/* and supabase/functions directories as workspace members, allowing esbuild native builds while suppressing supabase CLI postinstall, and constraining built-dependency installation to esbuild only.
nodes.languageNotes: allowBuilds and onlyBuiltDependencies together prevent supabase CLI from running postinstall scripts that would conflict with the managed Supabase CLI version.

nodes.name: cron-services.json
nodes.summary: Manifest of 8 Railway cron service definitions (cron-tag-queue, cron-scrape-sources, cron-db-maintenance, cron-cleanup-stale, cron-enrich-events, cron-weekly-digest, cron-send-reminders, cron-review-events), each specifying builder, cron schedule, restart policy, and required deployment status used by main.tf for drift validation.

nodes.name: main.tf
nodes.summary: Terraform module implementing Railway cron drift detection: reads cron-services.json as the expected manifest, optionally fetches live Railway service metadata via GraphQL, computes field-level diagnostics for each cron service, and enforces correctness via output preconditions used by GitHub Actions and Spacelift.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Terraform output preconditions (>=1.5.0 feature) as the enforcement gate — plan fails with human-readable diagnostics when live Railway state drifts from the cron-services.json manifest.

nodes.name: versions.tf
nodes.summary: Declares Terraform version constraint (>=1.5.0) and pins the hashicorp/http provider (~>3.5) used by main.tf for Railway GraphQL calls.

nodes.name: oxfmt.base.json
nodes.summary: Base oxfmt (Biome-compatible formatter) configuration for the monorepo, specifying 2-space indentation, no semicolons, double quotes, ES5 trailing commas, and 100-character print width.

nodes.name: oxlint.base.json
nodes.summary: Base oxlint configuration enabling React, TypeScript, unicorn, and oxc plugins with correctness rules as errors and warnings for exhaustive deps, unused vars, and explicit any.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the shared code-quality config package (@cypress-ink-labs/config-quality), exporting oxfmt and oxlint base configs via the exports map.

nodes.name: base.json
nodes.summary: Base TypeScript compiler configuration for the monorepo enabling strict mode, ESNext modules with bundler resolution, verbatimModuleSyntax, noEmit, and strict unused-variable checking targeting ES2023.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses erasableSyntaxOnly and verbatimModuleSyntax — modern strict TypeScript settings that disallow runtime-emitted type constructs.

nodes.name: node.json
nodes.summary: Node.js-specific TypeScript configuration extending the base config, adding ES2023 lib and @types/node type definitions for server-side packages.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the shared TypeScript configuration package (@cypress-ink-labs/config-typescript), exporting base, node, and react-vite tsconfig presets via the exports map.

nodes.name: react-vite.json
nodes.summary: React + Vite TypeScript configuration extending the base config, adding DOM libs, Vite client types, and react-jsx transform for frontend packages.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Release changelog for the @family-events/contracts package, currently tracking version 0.0.2 with patch changes.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @cypress-ink-labs/contracts v0.0.3, a published npm package exporting TypeScript types generated from the family-events Supabase schema with GitHub Package Registry publishing config.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for the contracts package, extending the shared node preset and including all src files.

nodes.name: check-railway.sh
nodes.summary: Audits Railway services against repo IaC state via the Railway GraphQL API, detecting rootDirectory and cronSchedule drift; supports a --fix flag to auto-correct mismatches.

nodes.name: graphql
nodes.summary: Sends a GraphQL query to the Railway API using curl with the stored bearer token.

nodes.name: expected_root_for
nodes.summary: Returns the expected rootDirectory for a named Railway service by querying the IaC JSON, or UNMANAGED/NULL if not found.

nodes.name: expected_cron_for
nodes.summary: Returns the expected cronSchedule for a named Railway service from IaC JSON, or empty string if not found.

nodes.name: deno-install-functions.sh
nodes.summary: Iterates all Supabase Edge Function directories and runs deno install for each function that has both deno.json and index.ts, updating deno.lock files.

nodes.name: deploy.sh
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper around the @cypress-ink-labs/deploy-cli that normalizes argument conventions (adding 'deploy' subcommand when missing) before delegating to pnpm.

nodes.name: setup-local.sh
nodes.summary: Re-applies local development settings after a supabase db reset: configures app.settings.* database variables, writes .env.development.local files for the monorepo root and apps/web, and bootstraps the local admin user.

nodes.name: supabase-functions-serve.sh
nodes.summary: Cleans stale Deno node_modules symlinks in the Supabase functions directory before delegating to supabase.sh to start the local functions server.

nodes.name: supabase.sh
nodes.summary: Resolves and invokes the Supabase CLI from the system PATH, the local node_modules binary, or falls back to npx, ensuring consistent CLI behavior across environments.

nodes.name: sync-cron-runner.sh
nodes.summary: Copies the canonical cron/_shared/cron-runner.sh into each of the eight Railway cron service directories, keeping cron runner scripts in sync after edits to the shared source.

nodes.name: test.sh
nodes.summary: Runs the full suite of 15 Supabase SQL integration tests (RLS, RPC, pagination, security, cron) against a target Postgres database resolved from args, env, or local supabase status.

nodes.name: usage
nodes.summary: Prints usage instructions for test.sh including DB_URL resolution order and prerequisites.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the database evidence and diagnostic scripts directory, describing the purpose and sections of collect-db-evidence.sql and prerequisites for running it.

nodes.name: collect-db-evidence.sql
nodes.summary: Read-only production diagnostic SQL script covering pg_stat_statements query performance, index usage, table bloat, constraint pre-validation checks for several tables, and commented EXPLAIN templates for key RPCs.

nodes.name: find-missing-end-times.sql
nodes.summary: Diagnostic SQL script that reports summary statistics and a detailed list of events missing an end_datetime but having a start_datetime, ordered by recency.

nodes.name: wipe-live-events.sh
nodes.summary: Destructive maintenance script that truncates all live event and scrape-history tables from the linked Supabase project and resets event_source health fields, with an interactive confirmation guard unless --yes is passed.

nodes.name: usage
nodes.summary: Prints detailed usage instructions for wipe-live-events.sh including all affected tables and available options.

nodes.name: EMAIL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive setup guide for transactional email delivery via Resend, covering Supabase Auth email wiring, application email configuration, soft-failure behavior, delivery verification, and cost notes.

nodes.name: INVITE_GATE.md
nodes.summary: Documents the invite-gate feature controlling closed-beta versus open registration, listing affected database functions and providing SQL instructions to toggle the gate on or off.

nodes.name: LOCAL_LLM_TAGGING.md
nodes.summary: Proof-of-concept guide for running local LLM-based event tagging via a Railway-hosted service, covering service setup, Supabase function secrets configuration, smoke testing, and success criteria.

nodes.name: PRODUCTION_SETUP.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step production deployment checklist covering migration push, scraping scheduler configuration, first-admin bootstrap, edge function deployment, email setup via Resend, and verification steps.

nodes.name: 20260601000000_001_schema_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script for the initial schema migration that drops core tables and extensions established in the base schema.

nodes.name: admin_dashboard_stats.sql
nodes.summary: pgTAP-style SQL test verifying that the public.admin_dashboard_stats() RPC is inaccessible to anon and non-admin roles, returns a non-null JSONB object for enabled admins, and includes required keys such as total_events, dead_letters, and generated_at.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses SET LOCAL ROLE / RESET ROLE pattern to impersonate roles inside DO blocks, then asserts exceptions or result shapes directly without pgTAP framework.

nodes.name: admin_db_health.sql
nodes.summary: pgTAP-style SQL test verifying that public.admin_db_health_snapshot() is blocked for anon and non-admin roles, returns a valid JSONB object for enabled admins, and contains the expected keys including tag_queue_by_status and snapshot_at.

nodes.name: admin_events_rpc.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive SQL test for admin event RPCs (admin_events_enriched, admin_event_facets) verifying that non-admin, anon, and expired-admin callers are denied access while active admins can call these functions and receive correctly shaped results.
nodes.languageNotes: Fixtures three user types — admin, regular user, and expired admin — to cover all access-control branches for both RPC functions.

nodes.name: api_surface_hardening.sql
nodes.summary: Minimal SQL guard test asserting that pg_graphql is not installed and that the anon role holds no INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, or other mutation grants on any public schema table.
nodes.languageNotes: Checks information_schema.role_table_grants; intentionally very small to serve as a fast smoke guard for the API surface.

nodes.name: cron_rpc_security.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying that cron management RPCs (admin_list_railway_cron_jobs and related write functions) are restricted to enabled admins for reads and service_role for writes, blocking non-admin authenticated users and anon.

nodes.name: cron_toggle.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying the cron enable/disable lifecycle: anon cannot call is_cron_enabled, service_role can, non-admin authenticated users cannot call admin_set_cron_enabled, and enabled admins can toggle a cron label off and back on.

nodes.name: events_cursor_pagination.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test covering seven cursor-pagination scenarios for events_enriched and search_events RPCs, including first/second page correctness, city filter, date range filter, same-datetime tie-breaking by UUID, anon path returning false for personalization fields, and keyword search.
nodes.languageNotes: Seeds six published events with controlled datetimes and tie conditions to exercise the (start_datetime, id) ASC cursor composite key deterministically.

nodes.name: events_enriched_parity.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test asserting behavioral parity of the events_enriched RPC across anon and authenticated paths, covering is_favorited/is_in_calendar flags, zero-rating vs rated aggregates, alphabetically ordered tags JSONB array, draft event exclusion, and city filter scoping.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a single transaction fixture with multiple published events, one draft, ratings, favorites, and calendar entries to cover all parity dimensions in one pass.

nodes.name: invite_gate_oauth_signup.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying the closed-beta invite gate blocks uninvited Google/Apple OAuth signups when app.settings.require_invite is enabled, while allowing pre-invited email addresses and passing through when the gate is disabled.
nodes.languageNotes: Simulates auth.users inserts with raw_app_meta_data provider fields to replicate real OAuth flows inside a transaction test.

nodes.name: llm_event_review_processing.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test exercising the LLM event review pipeline: verifies default processing_mode is manual_review, tests manual/auto/LLM source processing modes, and validates that admin_events_enriched filters correctly by llm_review_status and llm_review_decision.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers the event_processing_mode enum and llm_event_review_status/llm_event_review_decision columns introduced for the AI-assisted review workflow.

nodes.name: reference_data.sql
nodes.summary: SQL smoke test verifying that the production-reset migration baseline includes the expected seed event sources (BREC Parks, Louisiana Philharmonic, Macaroni Kid) and that removed legacy sources and required maintenance RPCs and cron jobs are present or absent as intended.

nodes.name: rls_access_expiry.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying that access_expires_at is honored by is_enabled_user() and is_admin() helpers, blocking both regular users and admins whose access has expired even when is_enabled is true.

nodes.name: rls_anon_read.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying the anonymous read boundary: anon can see published events via public_events view, can read published raw events rows, is blocked from draft events, can see active cities, and cannot see inactive cities.

nodes.name: rls_privilege_escalation.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying three independent layers of defense against user_profiles.role privilege escalation: REVOKE on the role column, a trigger that blocks self-promotion, and the RLS WITH CHECK policy.

nodes.name: rls_public_events_view.sql
nodes.summary: SQL integration test for the RLS security boundary around public event previews, verifying anon visibility of published content, child-table (event_tags, ratings, comments) inheritance of the public_events boundary, and plan_events_for_user RPC user-ID enforcement.
nodes.languageNotes: Fixtures both published and draft events with symmetric child rows to enable side-by-side assertion of anon visibility rules.

nodes.name: role_smoke.sql
nodes.summary: Broad role smoke test covering 14 assertions across anon, authenticated, and service_role; verifies correct SELECT grants on public views and tables, correct RPC accessibility (events_enriched, search_events, is_cron_enabled), and that anon is blocked from cron RPCs.

nodes.name: trace_retention.sql
nodes.summary: SQL test verifying that private.run_daily_maintenance() prunes rows older than 90 days from event_ai_traces and source_extraction_traces while leaving recent rows intact.
